title: Bag of Words, TF-IDF, and Text Representation

questions.question: What does Bag of Words throw away?
questions.explanation: BoW counts tokens per document but discards their sequence.
questions.question_zh: Bag of Words 丢掉了什么？
questions.explanation_zh: BoW 统计每个文档的 token 数量，但丢弃顺序。

questions.question: Why scale TF by an IDF factor?
options: Words that appear in every document carry little discriminative signal and should be downweighted
questions.explanation: IDF penalizes ubiquitous words and boosts rare ones.
questions.question_zh: 为什么要把 TF 乘上 IDF？
options_zh: 在每个文档都出现的词区分力很小，应被降权
questions.explanation_zh: IDF 惩罚普遍出现的词，提升稀有词。

questions.question: In the smoothed IDF formula log((N+1)/(df+1)) + 1, what does the trailing +1 ensure?
options: A word that appears in every document still has IDF 1 instead of 0
questions.explanation: The +1 keeps ubiquitous words at IDF=1 so they are not zeroed out, matching scikit-learn's default.
questions.question_zh: 在平滑后的 IDF 公式 log((N+1)/(df+1)) + 1 中，末尾的 +1 保证了什么？
options_zh: 在每个文档都出现的词 IDF 仍是 1，而不是 0
对大 N 的数值稳定性
questions.explanation_zh: +1 让普遍出现的词 IDF 保持为 1，不至于被清零，与 scikit-learn 默认一致。

questions.question: Why L2-normalize TF-IDF rows before cosine similarity?
options: To convert sparse vectors to dense
Longer documents would otherwise dominate similarity scores; normalization puts all docs on the unit hypersphere
questions.explanation: L2 normalization removes document-length bias and turns cosine similarity into a dot product.
questions.question_zh: 为什么在 cosine similarity 之前要对 TF-IDF 行做 L2 归一化？
options_zh: 否则更长的文档会主导相似度分数；归一化把所有文档放到单位超球面上
questions.explanation_zh: L2 归一化消除文档长度偏差，并把 cosine similarity 变成点积。

questions.question: Which TfidfVectorizer setting is risky to enable for sentiment analysis?
questions.explanation: English stopword lists drop negations like 'not', which carry sentiment signal.
questions.question_zh: 对情感分析而言，TfidfVectorizer 的哪个设置是有风险的？
questions.explanation_zh: 英文停用词表会丢掉 'not' 等否定词，而它们承载情感信号。

questions.question: Which task does TF-IDF still win in 2026?
options: Spam detection, log anomaly flagging, and low-latency narrow classification
questions.explanation: TF-IDF beats embeddings when word presence is the signal and explainability or speed matter.
questions.question_zh: TF-IDF 在 2026 年仍能赢的任务是哪类？
options_zh: 垃圾邮件检测、日志异常告警和低延迟窄分类
questions.explanation_zh: 当词出现与否就是信号、且需要可解释性或速度时，TF-IDF 优于 embedding。

questions.question: Why does TF-IDF fail on the pair 'The movie was not good' vs 'The movie was excellent'?
options: Both documents share most tokens; bag-of-words has no notion of negation or word order
questions.explanation: Without word order or syntactic context, BoW cannot model that 'not' flips the sentiment of 'good'.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 TF-IDF 在 'The movie was not good' 与 'The movie was excellent' 这一对上失败？
options_zh: TF-IDF 需要 bigram 才能工作
两个文档大部分 token 相同；bag-of-words 没有否定或词序的概念
questions.explanation_zh: 没有词序或句法上下文，BoW 无法表达 'not' 翻转 'good' 的情感。

questions.question: What is the TF-IDF weighted embedding hybrid?
options: Using TF-IDF weights as a pooling weight over per-token embeddings before averaging
Running PCA on TF-IDF then re-embedding
questions.explanation: The hybrid weights each token's embedding by its TF-IDF score and averages, blending semantic capacity with rare-word emphasis.
questions.question_zh: TF-IDF 加权 embedding 的混合方法是什么？
options_zh: 在做平均之前用 TF-IDF 权重对每个 token embedding 做加权
对 TF-IDF 跑 PCA 然后再 embedding
拼接 BoW 和 dense embedding
用 TF-IDF 特征训练 BERT
questions.explanation_zh: 这种混合按 TF-IDF 分数对 token embedding 加权再平均，把语义能力与稀有词强调结合。
